build.description: Build-time overrides. Default output_dir is `public/`. When a user is migrating from an existing static site generator (Hugo / Jekyll / Astro / Next-static-export / etc.) whose `public/` / `_site/` / `dist/` / `out/` directory already exists, the AI must use `.xiaoyi-ssg-build/` instead to avoid collision. The renderer does not overwrite an existing non-empty output directory.

dev.description: Dev-server settings read by .xiaoyi-ssg/dev.js. The `port` field drives the mandatory port-auto-increment pattern (see prompts/render-node-spec.md).

port.description: Base port for the dev server. dev.js increments on EADDRINUSE (max 20 attempts) before exiting non-zero.

host.description: Bind address. Default loopback only; switch to 0.0.0.0 explicitly when needed for LAN preview.
